title: Cobblemon Sweets: Flavorful Variants Add-on
description: Cobblemon Sweets is a Minecraft Cobblemon add-on that adds dessert-themed Pokémon variants to the game, including candy, cake, ice cream, and more.
body:
## 🍬 Cobblemon Sweets: Flavorful Variants Add-on

**Cobblemon Sweets** is a charming Cobblemon add-on that introduces a wide range of **dessert-themed Pokémon variants** to your game. From candy-inspired designs to cake, ice cream, pastries, and other sweet treats, this add-on brings a playful and flavorful twist to your adventure. Each variant is crafted to feel charming, vibrant, and unique, giving your world a sweeter atmosphere and offering collectors plenty of delightful surprises to discover!

### 🍭 Available Versions

We currently offer two distinct versions of the mod to suit your playstyle:

| Version | Focus | Compatibility | Key Features |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **1.6.1** | **Spawn Variants** | Cobblemon **1.6.1 and above** | All Sweet variants are added as **simple spawn replacements** (sharing the same spawn locations as the originals). |
| **1.7.1** | **Cosmetic Features** | Cobblemon **1.7.1+** | We are gradually adding more and more variants using the **new cosmetic feature** introduced in Cobblemon 1.7.1, allowing for unique ways to obtain and equip them. |

### 💖 Current Sweet Variants Added

* Swablu
* Altaria
* Fidough
* Vanillite
* Vanillish
* Vanilluxe
* Clodsire
* Ponyta (Galarian)
* Alcremie
* Spheal
* Clampearl
* Wooloo

### ✨ Future Variants in Development

* Rapidash (Galarian)
* Milcery
* Daschbun
* Sealeo
* Miltank
* Swirlix
* Slurpuff
* Sinistea
* Polteageist
* Applin, Flapple, Appletun, Hydrapple
* Blacephalon

> **Design Note:** The wonderful designs for **Spheal** and **Clodsire** were created by **@ariamisu** on Instagram!
